element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic melee combat against introductory enemies
Resource management during combat and environmental hazards
Weapon usage constraints and tactical decisions
Weapon variety for different enemy types

element_introduction_order.element: Temporary ability enhancements (Ragebox Elixir, Grasshopper Tea, Darkened Looking Glass)

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Story progression and confrontation with primary threat
Major combat challenges tied to narrative progression

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platforming zones between combat encounters
Environmental breathing room (open spaces in Wonderland locations)
typical_tension_triggers: Enemy encounters with automatic target lock
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Linear progression with alternating combat-platforming sequences; tension builds through enemy density and environmental complexity increases; relief provided by narrative beats and traversal-only sections

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Scattered meta-essence and meta-substance crystals signal pickable resources; uncommon temporary enhancement items hidden throughout levels
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Wonderland locations contain hidden areas accessible through non-linear exploration; secret routes likely signaled by visual environmental cues (Alice Wonderland aesthetic conventions)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-focused: basic melee combat (Vorpal Blade), simple platforming, introduction of sanity/willpower mechanics in low-threat contexts
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalation: ranged weapons introduced, platforming complexity increases with rope-swing and vertical navigation, environmental hazards compound, multiple enemy types present simultaneously
difficulty_curve.late_game: Culmination: Jabberwock's Eye Staff assembly drives progression, boss encounters intensify, all mechanical systems tested in combination, full Wonderland traversal mastery required
notable_spikes: Vale of Tears progression (hazard density increase)
Jabberwock's Eye Staff component collection phases
Queen of Hearts confrontation and subsequent boss battles

notable_level_patterns.description: Safe spaces with NPCs and exposition alternate with high-threat combat and environmental hazard zones; sanity/willpower regeneration opportunities placed before dangerous sequences
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Village areas followed by Fortress of Doors

notable_level_patterns.description: Multi-tiered platforming sections requiring sequential mastery of climbing, rope-swinging, and gliding mechanics; enemy encounters interspersed to prevent pure traversal focus
Each new weapon type emerges when previous arsenal proves insufficient; combat encounters gated behind weapon acquisition to ensure player familiarity
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Ice Wand obtained before ice-puzzle-gated passages

notable_level_patterns.description: Willpower depletion forces tactical weapon selection; sanity low-thresholds create urgency to locate meta-essence crystals; creates pacing pressure without artificial time limits
